calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Michael Lieberman, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, John Chang, appears through his attorney D.L. Rencher. Respondent, Lau & Lau Law Group appears through Edward Lau.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lieberman.

EXHR (A) Retainer agreement and arbitration document
EXHR (B) 5 pages of billing statements
EXHA (1) 2 page letter from Lau & Lau to John Chang
EXHA (2) Reply letter to Mr. Lau

9:38am

Exhibits are retained, matter is submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Continued To Sep-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:5am
Judge Pro Tem Bruce Lubarsky, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, John Chang, appears through his attorney D.L. Rencher. Respondent, Lau & Lau is specially represented by attorney D.L. Rentcher.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lubarsky.

Both parties request continuance to attempt settlement. Continuance is granted to 9/2/10.

9:19am
